title: Citrusy Penne Pasta with Silky Sauce
description: A quick and easy pasta dish with a citrusy twist, featuring a silky sauce that complements the penne perfectly.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the penne pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the silky sauce (or heavy cream) to the skillet and stir to combine with the butter.
Add the citrus zest and juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Season the sauce with salt and black pepper to taste.
Drain the cooked penne pasta and add it to the skillet with the sauce.
Toss the penne pasta in the sauce until well combined.
Serve the citrusy penne pasta hot, garnished with additional citrus zest if desired.
